top_visible_issues: No online booking system is present, which may reduce conversion for prospective clients looking to schedule sessions directly from the site.
Mobile page speed of 63 suggests room for optimisation, particularly given that health and fitness audiences increasingly browse and book on mobile devices.
No blog or content updates section is visible, which may limit ongoing search visibility and the ability to showcase expertise over time.
outreach_hook: Core Health and Performance has a strong reputation in Westport with a perfect 5-star rating across 53 reviews, but the current site may not be converting that goodwill into new client bookings as effectively as it could. Adding an online booking flow and improving mobile performance could meaningfully reduce friction for prospective clients. There is also an opportunity to surface your expertise through fresh content, supporting longer-term visibility in local search.
